videos.headline: Grayson James fakes out everyone for Boston College TD
videos.description: Grayson James outsmarts North Carolina and even the cameraman on his way to a touchdown for Boston College.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Grayson James fakes out everyone for Boston College TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kye Robichaux seals Boston College's victory with an 8-yard TD
videos.description: Kye Robichaux punches in an 8-yard rushing touchdown to stamp Boston College's win over UNC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kye Robichaux seals Boston College's victory with an 8-yard TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Turner takes it to the house on a 78-yard BC pick-six
videos.description: Ryan Turner intercepts the pass for a 78-yard pick-six to boost Boston College's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Turner takes it to the house on a 78-yard BC pick-six) 2024/11/23 ESHEET
